content: We can treat every incrementally ingested streaming experience for Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM) training as a new edge or node added dynamically to a growing semantic network of agent state concepts, where the ICM’s prediction error-driven curiosity naturally prioritizes adding high-uncertainty connections that fill gaps in the agent’s world knowledge. This dynamic semantic network structure in turn lets the ICM avoid redundant curiosity about previously explored concept combinations, focusing exploration on under-connected regions of the agent’s knowledge space.
source_topics: Streaming experience processing for ICM training
